prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Waking up is an exceptionally underwhelming daily transaction; the product arrives with a forced, abrupt initiation via jarring auditory alarms or internal biological fail-safes, featuring substandard initial performance characterized by groggy system lag, stiff physical components, and a deeply unsatisfying user interface plagued by incoherent thoughts and a pervasive sense of existential dread, all before the essential caffeine patch has been applied, resulting in a consistently poor out-of-the-box experience with zero stars, would not recommend, and actively exploring competitor products like “eternal slumber,” though its delivery estimates remain unclear.
